# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  labels:
    app: my-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service-container
        image: my-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 3000
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        env:
        - name: SECURE_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: my-service-secrets
              key: api-key
        - name: CONFIG_PATH
          value: "/etc/my-service/config"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config-volume
          mountPath: /etc/my-service
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: config-volume
        configMap:
          name: my-service-config
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: my-registry-key
      serviceAccountName: my-service-account
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: my-service-account
  annotations:
    eks.amazonaws.com/role-arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/my-service-role
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: my-service-secrets
type: Opaque
data:
  api-key: <base64-encoded-api-key>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: my-service-config
data:
  config.yaml: |
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Config
    metadata:
      name: my-service-config
    data:
      key: value
